title: Elbaf’s Crisis Converges
description: On pages 2–4, this part follows Loki, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Robin, Nami, Unknown person #3 as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: LOKI'S THRUDHEIM ROARS OUT!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AOW!!! It's one helluva party over there, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What're you doin; lilith?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Isn't vegapunk in that box?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a good thing I unloaded it near the school!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: These are owni-Drain Converters. ODC's for short!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm fairly certain hover tech should be feasible on Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Come again?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you feel it?! Over here, back there!! This place is teeming with energy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's all around us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you never tried harnessing anything stronger than Cola to power yourself?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WOAH!! The flames have grown so much!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a nightmare!! The world really might be ending today!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did 'You see that thing?! That Dragon's so big it even dwarfs Kadot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then again, wasn't Luff! On its back??? Does that mean it's on our side?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That dummy's always pulling some reckless stunt!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You ready, Zeus?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yep, I'm good to go!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's hurry! This will still be tricky, but at least we don't have to worry about the kids anymore!!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Saul!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: UUGH...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry... I got no business Lyn' round here at a time like this.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Are you okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Here we go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: C'mon, zeus!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This is urgent!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got to put out the fires at the school and library!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: leave it to me, Nami!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I saved up plenty of water like you asked!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's our perfect Nam-san!! She's ready for anything!!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Pouring Rain!!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
